title: TPO Membrane Delamination at Parapet Transition — Freeze-Thaw Climate
failure_mode: Membrane delamination from parapet substrate at base flashing termination
frequency: recurring — observed across 12 projects in climate zones 5A/6A

evidence_refs.summary: Forensic pull-test results showing <2 pli adhesion at parapet base

notes: Most failures observed 3-7 years post-installation. Correlated with inadequate substrate priming.
